SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.compliance

Class Sts0131Gate

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.compliance.Sts0131Gate
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Sts0131Gate extends Object implements Serializable
Generalised STS-0131 acceptance gate.

Equinor's STS-0131 ("Safety technology - supplementary requirements") gates a range of process safety result types - not only depressurisation. This class consolidates several pass/fail checks (depressurisation, PSV sizing margin, MDMT, trapped-liquid rupture, SIL versus NOG 070 minimum) into a single, traceable verdict.

Each check is optional: only the checks explicitly added produce findings. The overall gate passes only when every configured check passes.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

    • Sts0131Gate

      public Sts0131Gate()

  • Method Details

    • addDepressurisation

      public Sts0131Gate addDepressurisation(STS0131AcceptanceResult result)
      Adds an STS-0131 depressurisation check to the gate.
      Parameters:
      result - depressurisation acceptance result; never null
      Returns:
      this gate

    • addPsvSizingMargin

      public Sts0131Gate addPsvSizingMargin(double requiredAreaIn2, double selectedAreaIn2, double requiredMargin)
      Adds a PSV sizing margin check. STS-0131 typically requires the selected orifice to provide at least 10% margin over the required area.
      Parameters:
      requiredAreaIn2 - required orifice area in square inches
      selectedAreaIn2 - selected standard orifice area in square inches
      requiredMargin - required margin as a fraction (e.g. 0.10 for 10%)
      Returns:
      this gate

    • addMdmt

      public Sts0131Gate addMdmt(double minimumWallTemperatureC, double designMdmtC)
      Adds an MDMT check comparing the minimum metal temperature reached during a transient with the design MDMT.
      Parameters:
      minimumWallTemperatureC - minimum wall metal temperature reached (degC)
      designMdmtC - design MDMT (degC)
      Returns:
      this gate

    • addTrappedLiquidRupture

      public Sts0131Gate addTrappedLiquidRupture(TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult result)
      Adds a trapped-liquid fire-rupture check.
      Parameters:
      result - trapped liquid fire rupture result
      Returns:
      this gate

    • addSil

      public Sts0131Gate addSil(Nog070SilDetermination sil)
      Adds a NOG 070 SIL determination to the gate.
      Parameters:
      sil - NOG 070 SIL determination result
      Returns:
      this gate

    • addCustom

      public Sts0131Gate addCustom(String checkName, boolean ok, String message)
      Adds a generic custom check.
      Parameters:
      checkName - short identifier
      ok - pass/fail flag
      message - human readable message
      Returns:
      this gate

    • getFindings

      public List<Sts0131Gate.Finding> getFindings()
      Returns:
      immutable view of all findings

    • isAcceptable

      public boolean isAcceptable()
      Returns:
      true when no finding has severity Sts0131Gate.Severity.FAIL

    • countFailures

      public int countFailures()
      Returns:
      number of FAIL findings

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Returns the gate as pretty JSON.
      Returns:
      JSON string
